response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering experience across multiple domains, including geospatial development with GISCollective and low-latency systems (Dlang at Dunnhumby). However, his primary expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited direct experience in modern C++ or Rust for routing/tiling pipelines. His geospatial work is promising but may not align closely enough with the core routing data pipeline requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and real-time systems (Dlang at Dunnhumby)
Strong background in distributed systems, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship (TDD, pairing, DevOps tools)
Proven ability to learn new technologies and contribute across full-stack environments
concerns: Limited direct experience with modern C++ or Rust, which are primary requirements for this role
No explicit mention of routing data pipeline design, tiling, or navigation systems in recent roles
Geospatial work (GISCollective) is relevant but may not address the scalability/performance demands of routing tiles
